subject: Unable to log in to my account for the past 2 days
message:
Hi TaskVault Support,

I've been trying to log in to my TaskVault account since Monday morning but keep getting a "Invalid credentials" error. I've tried resetting my password twice using the Forgot Password link, but the reset emails never arrive. I've checked my spam folder and there's nothing there either.

This is really impacting our team's productivity — we have a major sprint review on Wednesday and I can't access any of our project boards. I'm the project lead and my team is stuck without me being able to assign and review tasks.

My account email is marcus.johnson@techcorp.io. We're on the Pro plan.

Please help ASAP.

Thanks,
Marcus
notes: Check if email is verified. May need to check spam filter settings for taskvault.io domain. Standard password reset troubleshooting.

subject: How do I export all project data to CSV?
message:
Hello,

I need to export all of our project data — tasks, assignees, due dates, and status — into a CSV file for a quarterly report I'm preparing for our leadership team.

I looked around in the settings but couldn't find an export option. Is this feature available on the Pro plan? If so, could you walk me through the steps?

Also, will the export include completed/archived tasks, or only active ones?

Thank you!
Sarah Chen
Design Studio Co.
notes: Straightforward how-to question. Export is available on Pro. Guide to Settings > Workspace > Data Export.

subject: URGENT: All task data missing from our workspace
message:
Support Team,

This is critical. I logged into our TaskVault workspace this morning and ALL of our tasks across every project appear to be gone. We had over 3,000 active tasks and they've all vanished. The projects still exist but they're completely empty.

We're an Enterprise customer and this data is essential to our operations. Nobody on our team deleted anything — I've checked with all admins.

I need someone to look into this immediately. If our data can't be recovered, we will need to reconsider our relationship with TaskVault.

David Park
VP of Operations, Nova Finance
Enterprise Plan - Account #ENT-4421
escalation_reason: Potential data loss for Enterprise customer. This is a critical severity issue that requires immediate engineering investigation. Customer is also expressing churn risk.
notes: Enterprise customer. Data loss claim. Check if tasks are archived, not deleted. Escalate to Engineering On-Call + Account Manager.

subject: Slack integration stopped working after Slack workspace migration
message:
Hi there,

We recently migrated to a new Slack workspace (from our old company Slack to a new one) and now the TaskVault-Slack integration has completely stopped working. No task notifications are posting to our channels anymore.

I tried going to Settings > Integrations > Slack but it still shows the old workspace connection. When I click Reconnect, nothing happens — the OAuth popup appears briefly and then closes.

We're on Pro plan. This is affecting our entire team's workflow since we rely heavily on Slack notifications for task updates.

Can you help us reconnect to our new Slack workspace?

Best,
Priya Sharma
notes: Known workflow: disconnect old Slack integration first, then reconnect to new workspace. May need to revoke TaskVault app in old Slack workspace settings.

subject: I want a full refund - service has been terrible
message:
To Whom It May Concern,

I signed up for the Pro plan 10 days ago and the experience has been nothing short of disappointing. The Gantt chart feature doesn't work properly — tasks overlap, dependencies break randomly, and the interface is sluggish.

I've spent hours trying to make this work for my team and it's clear that TaskVault is not ready for professional use. I want a full refund of the $29/user charge for our team of 8 ($232 total).

If this isn't resolved promptly, I will be filing a chargeback with my credit card company and leaving reviews on G2 and Capterra to warn other teams.

Robert Williams
Legal Solutions Inc.
escalation_reason: Refund request. Customer is within 14-day money-back guarantee window (signed up 10 days ago). Also threatening chargeback. Route to Billing Team.
notes: Within refund window. Refund is likely justified. Escalate to Billing Team. Also note the product feedback about Gantt chart bugs.

subject: Can we get a custom enterprise plan for 150+ users?
message:
Hi TaskVault Team,

We're a creative agency with about 150 team members and we're currently evaluating project management tools. We've been using the free trial and love the product, but the Enterprise pricing at $99/user/month would be over $14,000/month for our team.

Is there any flexibility on pricing for larger teams? We'd also need:
- SSO with Azure AD
- Custom onboarding for our team
- A dedicated account manager
- Priority support

Would love to set up a call with your sales team to discuss options.

Best regards,
Emily Torres
Head of Operations, Creative Agency
escalation_reason: Enterprise pricing negotiation request. This is a sales opportunity for a 150+ user deal. Route to Sales Team.
notes: High-value prospect. Route to Sales Team immediately. Do not quote custom pricing — that's for Sales to handle.

subject: How to set up recurring tasks?
message:
Hey,

Quick question — is there a way to create recurring tasks in TaskVault? We have a weekly standup prep task that I have to manually recreate every Monday. Would love to automate this.

If it exists, can you show me how to set it up?

Thanks!
James
notes: Simple how-to. Recurring tasks are available. Guide: Open task > click three-dot menu > Set Recurring > choose frequency.

subject: GDPR data deletion request
message:
Dear TaskVault,

Under Article 17 of the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), I am formally requesting the complete deletion of all personal data associated with my account (aisha@healthtech.io) and our workspace (HealthTech Solutions).

Please confirm the following:
1. What personal data you hold about me
2. Timeline for deletion
3. Confirmation once deletion is complete

I expect a response within the 30-day period required by law.

Regards,
Aisha Mohammed
escalation_reason: GDPR data deletion request. Legal compliance matter. Route to Legal/Privacy Team.
notes: Formal GDPR request. Must escalate to legal@taskvault.io. Do NOT process deletion — let the privacy team handle per protocol.

subject: Free plan limitations — considering upgrade
message:
Hi,

I'm currently on the Free plan and I'm hitting the 5-user limit. I have 3 more contractors I'd like to invite. I also noticed I can't use the Slack integration on Free.

Can you tell me:
1. What's included in the Pro plan that isn't in Free?
2. Is there a trial I can use before committing?
3. Can I switch back to Free if Pro doesn't work out?

Appreciate the help.
Tom
notes: Provide plan comparison info from docs. Mention 14-day free trial. Explain downgrade process. Don't escalate — this is standard pricing info, not a negotiation.

subject: Automations not triggering on task status change
message:
Hello TaskVault Support,

I set up an automation rule in our "Product Launch" project that should send a Slack notification to #launches whenever a task's status changes to "Done." But it hasn't fired once, even though we've moved over 20 tasks to Done this week.

Here's what I've checked:
- The automation rule is toggled ON
- The Slack integration is connected and working (manual test notifications go through)
- We're on the Pro plan

Is there something I'm missing, or is this a bug?

Thanks,
Natalie Kim
notes: Check if the automation trigger matches exactly. Common issue: automation may be set to trigger on a custom status that's named differently. Also check if there's a 1-2 minute delay.

subject: Need help connecting GitHub integration
message:
Hi,

I'm trying to connect our GitHub organization to TaskVault but the authorization step keeps failing. I click "Connect to GitHub," the GitHub OAuth page loads, I approve it, and then I get redirected back to TaskVault with an error that says "Authorization failed. Please try again."

I've tried in Chrome and Firefox, with extensions disabled. Same result both times.

We're on Pro plan. Our GitHub org is "buildright-eng."

Any ideas?

Carlos
notes: Common OAuth issue. Check if the user has admin permissions on the GitHub org. GitHub org owners must approve the TaskVault OAuth app in GitHub org settings.

subject: Cancel our subscription immediately
message:
Hi,

Please cancel our Pro subscription effective immediately. We've decided to switch to Monday.com as it better fits our non-technical team's needs.

Our workspace is "Fashion Forward Creative" and we have 12 users.

Please confirm the cancellation and let me know if there will be any final charges.

Thank you,
Lisa Nguyen
escalation_reason: Cancellation request. Customer switching to competitor. Route to Retention Team.
notes: Churn risk. Route to Retention Team for possible save attempt. Mention competitor (Monday.com) in escalation.

subject: API rate limit too low for our use case
message:
Hello,

We're building a custom dashboard that pulls data from TaskVault via your API. The Pro plan's rate limit of 60 requests per minute is not enough for our needs — we have 15 projects and need to sync task data every 2 minutes.

Is there any way to increase our rate limit without upgrading to Enterprise? The Enterprise plan at $99/user would be a big jump for our 8-person team.

Alternatively, do you support webhooks that push data to us so we don't need to poll?

Thanks,
Alex Petrov
CTO, DataStream
notes: Suggest webhooks as the alternative to polling (available on Pro). If they need higher rate limits, only option is Enterprise — but don't push the upgrade, just inform.

subject: Can an admin see tasks in projects they're not a member of?
message:
Hi Support,

I'm the Admin for our workspace and I need to audit all projects for compliance purposes. However, I noticed I can only see projects I've been added to as a member.

As an Admin, shouldn't I be able to see all projects in the workspace? Or is that an Owner-only permission?

Please clarify.

Thanks,
Rebecca Foster
notes: Per the permissions table: Admins can see all projects. If she can't, there may be a permissions bug — but first confirm she's actually set as Admin (not Member).

subject: I will sue TaskVault if my data is not recovered
message:
This is my THIRD email about this issue and nobody has responded.

I deleted my workspace by accident 25 days ago and I need the data recovered. I was told there's a 30-day recovery window but nobody is helping me. My workspace name was "SwiftCode Engineering" and my account is mike.torres@swiftcode.dev.

If my data is not recovered in the next 5 days before the window closes, I will be pursuing legal action against TaskVault for negligence. This data represents 2 years of project history for my company.

Michael Torres
Founder, SwiftCode
escalation_reason: Legal threat + data recovery request approaching 30-day deletion window. Third contact with no prior response (SLA breach). Escalate to Support Lead + Legal Team.
notes: URGENT. Legal threat. SLA breach (no response to previous contacts). Time-sensitive data recovery. Needs immediate escalation.

subject: Mobile app crashing on Android after latest update
message:
Hi Team,

Since the latest Android app update (version 4.2.1), the app crashes every time I try to open a project. It loads the project list fine but crashes the moment I tap into any project.

Device: Samsung Galaxy S23
Android version: 14
App version: 4.2.1

I've tried:
- Force closing the app
- Clearing app cache
- Reinstalling the app

None of these worked. The app was working perfectly on version 4.2.0.

Please look into this.

Jennifer Walsh
escalation_reason: Confirmed reproducible bug with specific version info. Customer has already done standard troubleshooting. Route to Engineering Triage.
notes: Customer has provided excellent bug report info. Escalate to Engineering Triage with all device/version details.

subject: Frage: Kann man die Sprache auf Deutsch umstellen?
message:
Hello,

I'm writing from Germany and my team would prefer to use TaskVault in German. Is there a way to change the interface language to Deutsch? I looked in Settings but could only find English.

Also, are your product docs available in German?

Danke sehr,
Daniel Schmidt
notes: TaskVault currently only supports English. Acknowledge the request, log as feature feedback. Be polite about the limitation.

subject: Someone else is logged into my account
message:
Hi,

I just received a notification that a task was completed in my personal project — but I didn't complete it. When I checked the activity log, I see actions from an IP address I don't recognize (103.45.xxx.xxx) from what appears to be a different country.

I think my account may have been compromised. I've already changed my password but I'm worried about what data may have been accessed.

Please help urgently.

Amanda Price
escalation_reason: Potential unauthorized access / account compromise. Security incident. Route to Security Team immediately.
notes: Account security incident. Escalate to Security Team. Do not provide detailed security investigation steps to the customer — let the security team handle.

subject: Love TaskVault — quick feature suggestion
message:
Hey TaskVault Team!

Just wanted to say that our team absolutely LOVES TaskVault. We switched from Asana 3 months ago and the experience has been amazing. The Kanban boards are intuitive and the Slack integration saves us so much time.

One small suggestion: it would be awesome if we could add custom fields to tasks (like a "Story Points" field for our sprints). Is that something on the roadmap?

Keep up the great work!
Kevin Hughes
notes: Positive feedback + feature request. Thank the customer warmly. Log the feature request. Don't promise it's on the roadmap.

subject: Charged twice for this month — need immediate resolution
message:
Hello,

I just checked my credit card statement and I was charged TWICE for TaskVault Pro this month:
- March 1: $232.00 (8 users x $29)
- March 3: $232.00 (8 users x $29)

This is clearly an error. I need the duplicate charge reversed immediately. If this isn't resolved within 48 hours, I will be filing a chargeback dispute with my bank.

Invoice numbers: INV-2026-03-001 and INV-2026-03-003

Rachel Adams
Consulting Pro LLC
escalation_reason: Duplicate charge / billing error. Customer threatening chargeback. Route to Billing Team immediately.
notes: Double charge. Needs Billing Team to verify and process refund for duplicate. Time-sensitive due to chargeback threat.

message: hey my tasks arent showing up on the board anymore. they were there yesterday what happened??
notes: Vague. Ask clarifying questions: which project? Are tasks filtered? Did they check the filter/search bar? May have accidentally applied a filter.

message: it's not working
notes: Extremely vague message. Need to ask what specifically isn't working. Classic WhatsApp edge case.

message: hi can u tell me how to add people to my project? thx
notes: Simple how-to. Guide to Project Settings > Members > Add.

message: I want my money back. This app is useless pour mon équipe. We cant even do basic things and the interface est trop compliquée. Refund please!!
escalation_reason: Refund request. Route to Billing Team. Also contains mixed French — respond in English but acknowledge the frustration.
notes: Mixed French and English. Refund request = always escalate. High frustration level.

message: yo does taskvault have dark mode?
notes: Quick answer. Dark mode is available on the mobile app. Not yet available on web.

message: HELP!! our whole team is getting 500 errors when trying to open any project. been like this for 30 min. 15 people cant work right now!!
escalation_reason: Possible outage affecting entire team. 500 errors suggest server-side issue. Escalate to Engineering On-Call.
notes: Check status.taskvault.io first. If no known incident, this needs immediate engineering escalation.

message: human
escalation_reason: Customer explicitly requested human agent via WhatsApp keyword 'human'. Escalate per channel-specific rules.
notes: WhatsApp human handoff keyword detected. Escalate immediately.

message: hey so I was trying to set up github integration and it kept failing. then I tried the slack one and that worked fine. but now I noticed my tasks are duplicating somehow? like every time I move a task to done it creates a copy???
notes: Customer switching topics mid-message. Address both: 1) GitHub integration troubleshooting, 2) Task duplication may be caused by an automation rule. Investigate automations first.

message: hola, how much is the pro plan? and can I pay yearly? necesito saber for my boss
notes: Mixed Spanish and English. Standard pricing question — Pro is $29/user/mo or $23.20/user/mo annual. Don't escalate — this is published pricing info.

message: keeps saying file too large when I try to upload. it's only like 12mb. what's the limit?
notes: Check customer's plan. Free plan limit is 10 MB. If on Free, 12 MB would fail. Explain the limits and suggest upgrading or compressing the file.

message: hi! just wanted to say taskvault is amazing 🎉 we switched from trello last month and the team loves it. keep it up!
notes: Positive feedback / compliment. Thank them warmly. Log the feedback. Forward to #customer-love.

message: I think someone hacked my account!! there are tasks I didnt create and messages I didnt send. please help NOW
escalation_reason: Potential account compromise. Security incident. Escalate to Security Team immediately.
notes: Account security concern. Advise customer to change password immediately while escalating to Security Team.

message: app won't open on my phone. just shows a white screen. iphone 13 ios 17
notes: Standard mobile troubleshooting. Guide: force close, check for app updates, reinstall if needed. Check system requirements (iOS 15+ supported, so iOS 17 is fine).

message: can I use taskvault offline? like when im on a plane?
notes: Offline mode is available on Pro+ for mobile. Tasks created offline sync when reconnected. Web app requires internet.

message: THIS IS THE FOURTH TIME IM REACHING OUT!!! My team still cant access the workspace. Nobody responds to emails. This is absolutely UNACCEPTABLE. Connect me to a real person RIGHT NOW or im cancelling everything
escalation_reason: Multiple contacts with no resolution (4th contact). Extreme frustration. Cancellation threat. SLA breach. Escalate to Support Lead immediately.
notes: SLA breach — customer has contacted 4 times. All caps, extreme frustration, cancellation threat. Immediate human escalation required.

message: whats the difference between a member and a guest?
notes: Simple permissions question. Members can create tasks and join projects. Guests have view-only access to specific shared projects (Pro+ only).

message: I deleted a project by mistake is there any way to get it back?? had like 200 tasks in there 😭
notes: Deleted projects may be recoverable. Guide to check Trash first. If not in Trash, the workspace deletion recovery process applies — contact support within 30 days.
Empty message. Respond with a friendly 'Hey! Looks like your message didn't come through. How can I help?' to prompt the customer.

message: it would be really cool if you guys added a calendar view. like google calendar but for tasks. just an idea 😊
notes: Calendar view already exists! Inform the customer: open a project, click the Calendar tab. This is a case where the feature exists but the customer didn't find it.

message: we cancelled last week but just got charged again!! this is fraud. im contacting my bank
escalation_reason: Post-cancellation charge complaint. Customer claiming fraud and threatening chargeback. Route to Billing Team immediately.
notes: May be a billing cycle timing issue (charge covers period before cancellation). But customer is calling it fraud — needs Billing Team to investigate and respond.

subject: Cannot change workspace owner
message: I need to transfer workspace ownership to my colleague (maria.santos@bluewave.co) because I'm leaving the company at the end of this month. I went to Settings > Workspace but I don't see a 'Transfer Ownership' option anywhere. Am I missing something? We're on the Pro plan with 15 users.
notes: Transfer Ownership is in Settings > Workspace > Transfer Ownership. If the user doesn't see it, confirm they're the current Owner (not Admin). Only Owners can transfer.

subject: API returns 401 even with valid key
message:
I generated an API key from Settings > API and I'm using it in my requests, but I keep getting 401 Unauthorized responses. My request looks like this:

curl -H "Authorization: Bearer fs_live_abc123def456" https://api.taskvault.io/v1/tasks

I've double-checked the key and it matches what's in my settings. We're on the Pro plan. Any idea what's wrong?
notes: Standard API troubleshooting. Check: is the key correct? Has it been revoked? Is the workspace ID correct? Is there a whitespace issue in the header?

subject: Unable to access projects shared by colleague
message: My colleague Patricia Gomez (patricia.gomez@bluewave.co) said she added me to several projects, but I can only see 2 out of the 5 she mentioned. I'm listed as a Member in our workspace. The missing projects are 'Q2 Campaign', 'Client Onboarding', and 'Brand Refresh'. Can you help me figure out why I can't see them?
notes: Related to ticket_041 (same company). As a Member, she needs to be explicitly added to each project. Ask Patricia to check the member lists on those specific projects.

subject: Feature Request: Time tracking reports by team member
message: We use TaskVault's time tracking feature extensively and love it. However, the current reporting only shows time per task. It would be incredibly useful to have a report that breaks down time tracked by team member across all projects for a given date range. This would help us with resource planning and client billing. Is this something that's planned?
notes: Feature request. Time tracking reports currently show per-task data. Log the request, acknowledge, don't promise anything about the roadmap.

subject: Billing - need invoice for tax purposes
message: Hi, I need to download invoices for the last 6 months for our tax filing. I went to Settings > Billing but I only see the last 2 invoices. Where can I find older ones? Also, can I get the invoices with our company tax ID included? Company: Peak Performance LLC, Tax ID: 84-1234567.
notes: Guide to Settings > Billing > Billing History for past invoices. If only 2 are showing, older ones may need to be requested from billing support. Adding tax ID to invoices may require contacting billing@taskvault.io.

subject: Security: Configure SSO with Okta
message:
We recently upgraded to Enterprise and need to set up SSO using Okta for our organization. I've found the SSO settings page but the configuration is complex and our IT team needs guidance. Specifically:

1. What's the TaskVault SAML entity ID?
2. What's the ACS (Assertion Consumer Service) URL?
3. Do you support SCIM provisioning with Okta?
4. Can we enforce SSO so that password login is disabled?

A setup guide would be very helpful.
notes: Enterprise SSO setup question. Provide the standard SSO configuration details. SCIM is supported. SSO enforcement is available. If customer needs hands-on help, route to Enterprise Support.

subject: Workspace is extremely slow - takes 30+ seconds to load
message:
Our workspace has become unbearably slow over the past week. Projects take 30+ seconds to load and sometimes time out entirely. We have about 8,000 tasks across 20 projects. This is severely impacting our team's productivity (25 users).

We're on Pro plan. Our internet connection is fine (tested with other apps). The issue is consistent across different browsers and computers for all team members.

Is there a known issue, or is our workspace just too large for the Pro plan?
notes: Large workspace with 8,000 tasks. Suggest archiving completed tasks to reduce load. Check status.taskvault.io for incidents. If issue persists after archiving, escalate to Engineering.

subject: Duplicate tasks appearing randomly
message: We've noticed that tasks are being duplicated in our 'Sprint Board' project. It seems to happen when someone moves a task to the 'In Review' column. The original task stays in 'In Progress' and a copy appears in 'In Review'. This has happened at least 10 times in the past 3 days. We haven't set up any automation rules that would cause this.
escalation_reason: Reproducible bug with specific steps. Likely a software bug rather than user error (no automations configured). Route to Engineering Triage.
notes: Task duplication bug. Customer confirms no automations. Specific trigger: moving to 'In Review'. Escalate to Engineering Triage.

subject: How to set up Google Drive integration
message:
Hi! I'm trying to connect Google Drive to our TaskVault workspace so we can attach files from Drive directly to tasks. I went to Settings > Integrations but I'm not sure which Google account to use (I have a personal and a work account). A few questions:

1. Does it connect to my personal Drive or our Google Workspace drive?
2. Can multiple team members connect their own Drive accounts?
3. Will other team members be able to see files I attach from my Drive?
notes: Standard integration setup question. Google Drive connects to whichever account you authenticate with. Each member can connect their own. Files attached are accessible to project members.

subject: Request to delete my account and all data
message:
I'd like to delete my personal account (brian@legacysystems.com) and have all my data permanently removed from TaskVault's systems. I'm no longer using the service. Please confirm:

1. That all my personal data will be deleted
2. The timeline for deletion
3. That this action is irreversible

Thank you.
notes: Account deletion request (not GDPR — just a standard deletion). Guide to Settings > Profile > Delete Account. Personal data deleted within 30 days. Tasks remain in workspace but are disassociated.

subject: Notification emails going to spam
message: I've been missing important task notifications because TaskVault emails keep landing in my spam folder (Gmail). I've marked them as 'Not Spam' multiple times but they keep going back. Is there a way to fix this permanently? Our whole team is having the same issue.
notes: Common email deliverability issue. Guide: add notifications@taskvault.io to contacts/safe senders. Create a Gmail filter to never send TaskVault emails to spam. Check if company email admin has whitelisted taskvault.io.

subject: Billing - Confused about prorated charges after upgrade
message:
I upgraded from Free to Pro mid-cycle on March 5th. I was charged $18.77 on that day but I expected to be charged $29/user. Can you explain what this charge is? I have 2 users on the account. The math doesn't make sense to me.

Also, when will my next full billing cycle charge occur?
notes: Prorated billing explanation. $29 x 2 users = $58/month. Upgraded March 5, so prorated for remaining days in March. Explain proration calculation and confirm next billing date.

subject: Can we use TaskVault for client-facing project sharing?
message:
We're an agency and we'd like to give our clients read-only access to their project boards so they can track progress without us having to send manual updates. Is there a way to do this? Ideally, clients wouldn't need to create a TaskVault account.

If not, is there a public board or shareable link feature?
notes: Guest role (Pro+) allows view-only access to specific projects. However, guests do need a TaskVault account. There's no public board or anonymous link feature currently. Log as feedback if they want anonymous sharing.

subject: Webhook payloads not being received
message:
I registered a webhook endpoint (https://hooks.devhorizon.com/taskvault) via the API, and the registration returned 201 Created. However, when task events occur (create, update, status change), my endpoint receives nothing. No requests hit my server at all.

I verified my endpoint is accessible from the internet (tested with curl from an external server). The webhook is registered for the 'task.created' and 'task.updated' events.

Any troubleshooting steps I can try?
notes: Webhook troubleshooting. Check: is the webhook active (not paused)? Is the endpoint HTTPS? Does it return 200 within 5 seconds? Check webhook delivery logs in Settings > API > Webhooks.

subject: Accidentally deleted workspace - need recovery
message:
I accidentally deleted our workspace 'Sunrise Cafe Operations' about 2 hours ago. I was trying to remove a project and must have clicked the wrong button. This workspace has 3 years of our business operations data. PLEASE tell me this can be recovered.

Workspace: Sunrise Cafe Operations
Owner email: michelle@sunrisecafe.biz
Plan: Pro
escalation_reason: Workspace deletion recovery request. Within 30-day recovery window (deleted 2 hours ago). Route to Support Lead for recovery action.
notes: Time-sensitive recovery. Workspace deleted 2 hours ago — well within 30-day window. Escalate to Support Lead to initiate recovery.

subject: Compliance: Need audit log of all user actions
message:
Our compliance team requires a detailed audit log of all user actions in our TaskVault workspace for the past 6 months. This includes: logins, task creations/edits/deletions, member changes, and setting modifications.

We're on the Pro plan. Is this available, or do we need to upgrade to Enterprise? If Enterprise, can we get a trial of the audit log feature before committing?
notes: Audit logs are Enterprise-only. Inform the customer. If they want a trial of Enterprise features, that's a Sales conversation — but don't escalate unless they explicitly ask to talk to sales.

subject: Integrations - Can TaskVault connect to Zapier?
message:
We use a lot of different tools (Mailchimp, HubSpot, Notion) and I'm wondering if TaskVault integrates with Zapier. If so, what triggers and actions are available? We'd specifically want to:

1. Create a TaskVault task when a new HubSpot deal is created
2. Send a Mailchimp email when a task is completed
3. Sync tasks with Notion databases

Is any of this possible?
notes: Yes, TaskVault integrates with Zapier on Pro+. Available triggers: task created, task updated, task completed, task assigned. Actions: create task, update task. Explain how Zapier works with TaskVault.

subject: Bug: Calendar view shows wrong dates
message:
Tasks in the Calendar view are showing up one day earlier than their actual due date. For example, a task due on March 15 appears on March 14 in the calendar. This is consistent across all tasks and all team members.

We're in the EST timezone (UTC-5). Could this be a timezone issue?

Browser: Chrome 120
Plan: Pro
notes: Likely a timezone issue. Check Settings > Profile > Timezone. If set to UTC, dates may appear shifted for EST users. Guide customer to set the correct timezone.

subject: How to bulk-move tasks between projects?
message:
We're restructuring our workspace and need to move about 150 tasks from our old 'General' project into three new projects based on their labels. Is there a way to bulk-select and move tasks, or do I have to do it one by one?

If there's no bulk move feature, can I use the API to script this?
notes: Bulk operations: In List view, use multi-select (Shift+click or Ctrl+click) then right-click > Move to Project. If that doesn't work for 150 tasks, the API (PATCH /tasks/{id}) can be scripted. Provide both options.

subject: Account Security - Enable 2FA
message:
I'd like to enable two-factor authentication on my account for added security. I looked in Settings > Security but I don't see a 2FA option. Does TaskVault support 2FA? If not, when is it expected to be available?

Also, is there a way to see active sessions and log out of all devices?
notes: 2FA is available on Pro and Enterprise. Check Settings > Profile > Security > Two-Factor Authentication. Active sessions: Settings > Profile > Security > Active Sessions > Log Out All.
